## Setup


```{r}

    devtools::install_github("pkheisig/spectreasy", ref = "dev")

    library(spectreasy)

    unmix_controls(
        scc_dir = "scc",
        unmixing_method = "AutoSpectral",
        af_n_bands = 100,
        save_report = TRUE,
        cytometer = "auto"
    )

    unmix_samples(
        sample_dir = "samples",
        unmixing_method = "AutoSpectral",
        save_report = TRUE
    )
        


```

```{r}

    unmix_controls(
        scc_dir = "scc",
        unmixing_method = "WLS",
    )

    unmix_samples(
        sample_dir = "samples",
        unmixing_method = "WLS",
    )


    unmix_controls(
        scc_dir = "scc",
        unmixing_method = "RWLS",
        rwls_max_iter = 5
    )

    unmix_samples(
        samples_dir = "samples",
        unmixing_method = "RWLS",
        rwls_max_iter = 5
    )

```

## Other features

```{r}

adjust_matrix()

build_spectral_panel()

```
